title: Headless Dweller
description: This mod is not a dweller reskin. A scary dweller mod about a monster with no head, or right arm. But somehow he can see and hear YOU!
body:
# **Update 0.0.4:**

- Added Configuration File
- New Custom Chase Sounds
- New Model and Animations
- More unexpected actions
- Improved spawn chances and conditions
- Smarter Headless
- Bug Fixes





Headless Features: 👣

It would break blocks just to reach you.
It will jump at you if needed.
More features won't be mentioned for unexpected actions.

Spawning Conditions: 🌙

It's spawning depends on the environment, moon, light, biomes, and more!

Other Features:

Arabic language.

**Requirements: Geckolib""



**Thanks for Pylo, MCreator.""
